# Sessile Fauna  

\newpage

## Ascidia  
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 1:6){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Bryozoa
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 8:20){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Cnidaria
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in c(21:41)){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Macroalgae
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 77:78){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Porifera
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 90:108){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Unidentified classifications
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in c(68:72,79:82)){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```
